recent_changes.description: Moved youtube-transcript-api update banner from Settings to MainScreen for better visibility. Integrated check into SummaryViewModel init.
Migrated to Gemini 2.5 Flash and disabled Thinking mode via root thinkingConfig for faster responses.

errors_encountered.error: Banner not showing up in trial run
errors_encountered.solution: Ensured updateInfo is collected as state in MainActivity and passed down to MainScreen component.

decisions_made.reason: Ensure developers see library update warnings immediately without checking settings.

decisions_made.decision: Run update check in ViewModel init
decisions_made.reason: Trigger background check as soon as app starts for proactive warning.
